name: Coconut Cream Easter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix the mashed potato, coconut, salt, and vanilla.
2. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar and continue mixing until everything is well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into egg-sized balls on a cookie sheet lined with wax paper.
4. Let the shaped eggs set overnight.
5. The following day, dip each egg ball into the melted chocolate.
6. Place the dipped eggs onto additional wax paper to allow them to harden completely.
7. Enjoy your coconut cream Easter eggs!
